#
# jacobrakai-honeypot-blocklist
#
# Description : IP addresses observed attacking live honeypot sensors
#               (SSH, FTP, telnet, MySQL, VNC). Honeypot-confirmed from
#               my own logs, not inferred from third-party data.
# Maintainer  : Jacob Durham
# Homepage    : https://jacobrakai.org/feed/
# Contact     : jacob@jacobrakai.org (delisting / false-positive reports)
# Inclusion   : two tiers, both requiring attack activity within the
#               last 30 days (entries age out automatically):
#               - credential (176 IPs): connected to a decoy service and
#                 submitted login credentials repeatedly (50+ attempts).
#               - scanner (5 IPs): submitted no credentials but probed
#                 at abusive volume — 1000+ connection events in-window
#                 (~33+/day sustained; the measured casual-scanner tail
#                 tops out well under half that threshold).
# Exclusions  : private/reserved ranges and known benign internet-survey
#               scanners (Censys, Rapid7 Sonar, Shadowserver, Shodan,
#               BinaryEdge) are filtered out before publication — from
#               BOTH tiers.
# Entries     : 181 (176 credential, 5 scanner)
# Updated     : 2026-07-22T20:00:01Z (refreshed hourly)
# License     : CC0 1.0 Universal (public domain) — use freely
# Warranty    : none; provided as-is. Entries may involve dynamic or
#               reassigned IPs and age out after 30 days of inactivity.
#
